payout_recommendation.rationale: Self-audit submitted but only 2 medium + 2 minor issues found with 7/10 confidence — rubric requires 3 findings with differentiated per-finding confidence; claim body is thin with no file/line references or reproduction steps visible

rankings.justification: jaxint claims self-audit of clawrtc-rs miner but body shows only summary without per-finding locations, reproduction, or known-failures section required by #6460 rubric

payout_recommendation.rationale: Includes direct link to PR review comment; review is on a security-focused PR which adds credibility

rankings.justification: PR review on #2706 includes review link and discusses P2P state poisoning — a substantive security topic, not boilerplate

payout_recommendation.rationale: Adversarial Steelman claim body is extremely vague — just says '5 adversarial arguments' and 'strongest defense' with no evidence of actual submission file or PR

rankings.justification: Claim #6784 references #6458 but provides no link to a submissions/steelman/ YAML file, no PR number, and body is under 200 chars of content

payout_recommendation.rationale: Star & Follow is trivially verifiable but jaxint has 3+ duplicate claims for same bounty (#6619 also claims #2103), suggesting repeated claiming of single-action bounties

rankings.justification: Duplicate claim for #2103 — jaxint already filed #6619 for the same Star & Follow bounty with same wallet RTC00a1347cc03c2aea1d6b35df16178fad4e9d6712

payout_recommendation.rationale: Judge Packet claim with no attached JSON file, no PR, and body is just one sentence — no evidence of actual structured submission

rankings.justification: Claim #6783 for #6459 contains zero evidence: no JSON payload, no PR link, no file path in submissions/judge-packets/ — just 'Submitted judge packet with rankings for 5 claim issues'
